definitions: （使）逐步升级；不断加剧；逐渐增加

examples.text: That same year in Honduras, thousands of United Fruit workers went on strike until the company agreed to recognize a new labor union. With the political and economic costs of running from Panama Disease escalating, United Fruit finally switched from Gros Michel to Panama disease-resistant Cavendish bananas in the early 1960s.
examples.explanation: 这里的 escalating 是 escalate 的现在分词，表示“不断上升、日益加剧”。句中指因巴拿马病带来的政治和经济成本越来越高，联合果品公司最终改种更抗病的卡文迪许香蕉。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri

relations.reason: deteriorate 表示“变坏、恶化”，escalate 在负面事态语境中常表示“加剧、升级”。两者都可描述问题、危机、成本、局势等朝更糟方向发展，虽然侧重点不同（deteriorate 偏状态变差，escalate 偏程度升级），但具有较强的近义跳转价值。
